---
id: list-4
title: "List/search valuations"
description: "Returns a paginated list of valuations with optional filters. Results are ordered valuation_date DESC, calculated_at DESC. Limit is clamped to 200."
sidebar_label: "List/search valuations"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List/search valuations"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/valuations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a paginated list of valuations with optional filters. Results are ordered valuation_date DESC, calculated_at DESC. Limit is clamped to 200.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
